description_long: This is a dark glass wine bottle with a deep burgundy neck and a matte black body. The bottle features a central rectangular label with a leafy green background and white text, suggesting a premium or artisanal wine. The neck is long and gently tapered, transitioning smoothly into the wider body, and is covered by a matching burgundy capsule or foil. The bottle's surface appears smooth and hard, typical of glass, with a subtle sheen. The label is the only decorative element, and the rest of the bottle is unadorned, emphasizing a classic and elegant design. The closure at the top is not clearly visible but is likely covered by the capsule.
description: A dark glass wine bottle with a burgundy neck, matte black body, and a leafy green label. The design is classic and elegant, with a smooth, hard surface and a capsule covering the neck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the leafy green label with white text and the burgundy neck capsule.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the edge of the label and the smooth, matte black body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unadorned matte black surface and the full profile of the bottle's shape.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view with partial label visibility and the bottle's smooth contour.
attribute_label_or_branding: A rectangular label on the front of the bottle, featuring a leafy green background with white text. The label is centered, medium-sized, and rectangular, with no visible logos or symbols beyond the text.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, gently tapered neck with a slight bulge at the transition to the body, covered by a capsule.
